verdict.note: same Settings rail tooltip, one screenshot per theme side-by-side: light bg=#eee8d5/ink=#073642/line=#ded7bf, dark bg=#21262d/ink=#f0f6fc/line=#30363d — exact palette vars, no browser-default box
no #ui-tip at 150ms into hover, visible by 700ms; bottom rail button renders data-place=top (above), top rail button flips to data-place=bottom (screenshot: bubble below the top graph button)
Tab from body focuses rail-btn: tip up immediately, anchor carries aria-describedby=ui-tip AND keeps aria-label; Esc dismisses (tip gone after keypress)

rail button hover: app-drawn .ui-tip.show role=tooltip in BOTH themes (no title attr anywhere on rail buttons, browser default box impossible). Light: bg 238,232,213 paper / ink 7,54,66 / hairline 222,215,191. Dark: bg 33,38,45 / ink 240,246,252 / border 48,54,61. Light shot: tooltip-light.png.
one app .ui-tip bubble, two correct skins from CSS vars — never the browser-default title box.

Re-measured against the preset world: hovering the same side-rail button shows the app-drawn .ui-tip in both presets — Minimal renders the graphite skin (bg rgb(54,54,54), ink rgb(237,237,237), hairline rgb(69,69,69)), Things the light skin (bg rgb(240,240,240), ink rgb(37,43,50)) — purely from the shared CSS vars, no browser-default title box, no console errors.
